english: Right Snake Creeps Down and Golden Rooster Stands on Right Leg
visual: Mirror of the left-side version — low creeping stance transitioning into a tall one-legged stance with opposite knee and hand raised.
motion_description: The person lowers into a deep stance, bearing weight on the bent left leg while the right leg is extended forward. The right hand sweeps downward along the inside of the right leg as the weight shifts continuously forward onto the right foot, with the torso turning slightly forward. The motion continues steadily as they rise into a one-legged stance on the right leg, lifting the left knee to hip height. Concurrently, the right arm curves upward to head level and the left hand lowers to hover just above the raised knee, concluding in a deliberate pause.
